name: jazzapedia
description: Jazzapedia monorepo - WWOZ scraper and web frontend

scripts.web: cd apps/web && DEPLOY_TARGET=docker DATABASE_PATH=../../data/jazzapedia.db pnpm dev --port 4321
scripts.web:stop: lsof -ti:4321 | xargs kill 2>/dev/null && echo 'Stopped server on 4321' || echo 'Nothing running on 4321'
